data.title: Donald Trump ‘sidelined’ by military brass during secret Iran rescue, report reveals | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Military aides kept Trump out of the Situation Room during the high-stakes Iran rescue mission of a US airman, fearing his temper would derail the mission.
data.keywords: Iran,iran war scenario,Israel Iran War,Donald Trump,NATO,Hormuz,strait of hormuz,Keir Starmer,F-15,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
